caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, suspenders, a red bow tie, and a tall, grey, pointed wig is speaking into a professional microphone. He wears glasses and black over-ear headphones. He is situated in a studio setting with a wall behind him covered in various framed photographs and displays, including one with the word "LEE" visible. On the left side of the screen, a logo reads "THE TALK PODCAST" with a microphone icon. On the right side, red and white text reads "GOSS TALK JOY". As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, slightly shifting his facial expression and posture. His mouth moves as he talks, and his head tilts slightly. The camera remains stationary throughout, keeping the man and the surrounding studio equipment in a medium shot.
